content:
### 7-Day Productivity Schedule (Starting Today - Day 1) **Assumptions**: 8-hour sleep (10 PM - 6 AM), balanced with work (6-8 hrs/day), AI research (1-2 hrs/day), meals, exercise, and review. Adjust as needed. Total daily focus: High productivity, low distractions. | Day | Theme | Schedule | |-----|-------|----------| | **Day 1: Setup & Foundations** | Kickoff planning + AI intro | - 6-7 AM: Wake, exercise (30 min run), breakfast
- 7-9 AM: Review goals, plan week (tools: Notion/Todoist)
- 9-12 PM: Core work (top 3 priorities)
- 12-1 PM: Lunch + walk
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (1 hr: Basics - What are AI agents? Read AutoGPT, BabyAGI overviews)
- 3-5 PM: Deep work block
- 5-6 PM: Emails/admin
- 6-10 PM: Dinner, family/relax, weekly review | | **Day 2: Deep Dive AI** | AI agents mechanics | - 6-7 AM: Exercise, breakfast
- 7-9 AM: Core work
- 9-12 PM: Focused tasks
- 12-1 PM: Lunch
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (2 hrs: Frameworks - LangChain, CrewAI; build simple agent demo)
- 3-5 PM: Work continuation
- 5-6 PM: Break/review
- 6-10 PM: Relax | | **Day 3: Application Focus** | Integrate AI into workflow | - Same morning routine
- 7-12 PM: Core work + test 1 AI agent tool (e.g., for task automation)
- 12-1 PM: Lunch
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (1.5 hrs: Use cases - research agents for productivity/market analysis)
- 3-6 PM: Apply learnings (automate 1 personal task)
- Evening: Relax | | **Day 4: Advanced AI** | Scaling & ethics | - Morning routine
- 7-12 PM: Work block
- 12-1 PM: Lunch
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (2 hrs: Multi-agent systems, ethics/security; papers: arXiv summaries)
- 3-6 PM: Experiment (build/deploy basic multi-agent)
- Evening: Light review | | **Day 5: Review & Optimize** | Mid-week reset | - Morning routine + 30 min meditation
- 7-11 AM: Core work
- 11-12 PM: Weekly progress review
- 12-1 PM: Lunch
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (1 hr: Tools comparison - AutoGen vs. others)
- 3-6 PM: Optimize schedule based on insights
- Evening: Social/relax | | **Day 6: Implementation Day** | Hands-on projects | - Morning routine
- 7-12 PM: Build AI agent for your key workflow (e.g., research assistant)
- 12-1 PM: Lunch
- 1-3 PM: AI Research (1 hr: Deployment - Vercel/Hugging Face)
- 3-6 PM: Test & iterate
- Evening: Celebrate progress | | **Day 7: Reflection & Plan Ahead** | Wrap-up + next week | - 6-7 AM: Longer exercise
- 7-10 AM: Final AI tweaks/review all research notes
- 10-12 PM: Core tasks/close loops
- 12-2 PM: Lunch + full week reflection (what worked? AI wins?)
- 2-4 PM: Plan next 7 days, export AI agent summary
- 4-10 PM: Unwind, no screens post-8 PM | **Key Tips**: - **AI Research Total**: ~10 hrs (resources: LangChain docs, YouTube: AssemblyAI, papers via Google Scholar). - **Tools**: Pomodoro timer, Focus@Will, Obsidian for notes. - **Track**: Daily 5-min journal. Hydrate, 10k steps. - **Flex**: Swap blocks if urgent. Ping me for tweaks!
